flags.label: 150%-time completion
flags.summary: 150%-time completion at Shelton State Community College fell 26% between 2007 and 2010 (13.1% → 9.7%).

flags.label: Undergraduate enrollment
flags.summary: Undergraduate enrollment at Shelton State Community College fell 22% between 2021 and 2024 (4.0k → 3.1k).

flags.label: In-state tuition
flags.summary: In-state tuition at Shelton State Community College rose 12% between 2021 and 2024 ($4.6k → $5.1k).

flags.label: 100%-time completion
flags.summary: 100%-time completion at Shelton State Community College rose 25% between 2009 and 2010 (4.2% → 5.3%).
